Metadata.title: Huiman Ark - AI Comic Generation Workspace
Metadata.description: Input story inspiration to generate storyboard scripts, character designs, and comic pages. Suitable for novel adaptations, short comic planning, and visual creation.

initial.title: Huiman Ark - AI Comic Generation Workspace
initial.description: Input story inspiration to generate storyboard scripts, character designs, and comic pages. Suitable for novel adaptations, short comic planning, and visual creation.

generating_story.title: Generating Story Outline - Huiman Ark
generating_story.description: Huiman Ark is generating multi-segment comic storyboard outlines based on your story description.

story_done.title: Story Outline Generated - Huiman Ark
story_done.description: Currently generated {segmentCount} comic segments, you can continue to generate character designs or directly generate comic pages.

generating_characters.title: Generating Character Designs - Huiman Ark
generating_characters.description: Huiman Ark is extracting character information and generating character designs to maintain consistency in subsequent comic characters.

characters_done.title: Character Designs Completed - Huiman Ark
characters_done.description: Character designs completed, you can continue generating comic pages based on {segmentCount} storyboard segments.

generating_comics.title: Generating Comic Pages - Huiman Ark
generating_comics.description: Huiman Ark is generating comic pages based on the storyboard {storySummary}.

done.title: Comic Generation Completed - Huiman Ark
done.description: Comic generation is all completed{segmentCountText}, you can continue to preview, download, or export the entire comic.

Page.sr_title: Huiman Ark AI Comic Generation Workspace
Page.sr_description: This is an AI creation workspace for generating comic story outlines, character designs, and storyboard comic pages, supporting reference images, character consistency control, and full comic export.

Header.apiKeyHint: Keys and configuration are stored only in your local browser cache and are never uploaded to any server.

EmptyCanvas.description: Describe your anime story or upload reference images, and AI will turn it into a personalized comic experience

Sidebar.storyPlaceholder: For example: In a forgotten cyberpunk city, a detective with memory-reading abilities gets entangled in a mysterious conspiracy. Dark style, ruthless characters...
Sidebar.advancedOptions: Advanced options (model, style, segment count, etc.)
Sidebar.paragraphHint: Supports the previous workflow with automatic, fixed, or custom segment counts.
Sidebar.panelsPerParagraphHint: Enter a range such as 3~6, and keep the minimum at 1 or above
Sidebar.ratioHint: Choose the landscape or portrait frame for generated comic pages
Sidebar.stylePreferencePlaceholder: For example: cute, dreamy, stylish, cozy...
Sidebar.uploadReferenceHint: Supports PNG, JPG/JPEG, WEBP, HEIC, and HEIF | Up to {count} images
Sidebar.uploadedCount: {current}/{total} uploaded. These images will influence both character design and comic page style.

alerts.maxReferenceImages: You can upload up to {count} reference images
alerts.onlyImageFiles: Only PNG, JPG/JPEG, WEBP, HEIC, and HEIF images are supported
alerts.missingStoryInput: Please enter a comic story description
alerts.missingCustomStyle: You selected custom style. Please enter a detailed anime style description first
alerts.invalidParagraphRange: Custom segment count must be between {min} and {max}
alerts.invalidPanelsPerParagraph: Panels per segment must be a range like 3~6, with a minimum of at least 1
alerts.invalidResult: The generated result does not match the storyboard format. Please try again

StoryBoard.title: Story outline ready!
StoryBoard.subtitle: {count} segments generated. Review them and choose your next step.
StoryBoard.helper: Generate character designs first to keep character appearances consistent across pages

CharacterBoard.withCharacterReference: Character design references are attached. Upcoming pages will prioritize the established character look.
CharacterBoard.withoutCharacterReference: No character design reference is being used. Pages will be generated directly from the script and style references.
CharacterBoard.noCharacterText: No character description has been generated yet. If you skip character design, pages will be generated from the script alone.
CharacterBoard.notGeneratedHint: Click the button below to generate this segment.

alerts.characterDesignFailed: Character design generation failed. Please try again later
alerts.imageFailed: Image generation failed. Please try again later
alerts.noExportableImages: No exportable images yet. Generate a character design or comic page first
alerts.partialFailed: Some comic pages failed to generate. Check the error on each card and retry

storyInput.title: Story Input
storyInput.description: Briefly describe the story you want to create and AI will generate a complete multi-panel comic outline.
storyInput.placeholder: For example: In a forgotten cyberpunk city, a detective with memory-reading abilities gets entangled in a mysterious conspiracy. Dark style, ruthless characters...
storyInput.hint: This component is now input-only. The actual generate button has been moved to the left sidebar.

scriptPreview.title: Generated Story Outline
scriptPreview.description: This preview component is read-only. Full operations have been moved to the main workspace.

characterPreview.title: Character Preview
characterPreview.description: This component is now read-only. The actual generation flow is handled in the main workspace.

imageGallery.empty: Generated comic pages will appear here
imageGallery.title: Results ({count} pages)
